key_messages: Anthropic builds the most trustworthy AI systems in the industry — safety and capability are not trade-offs, they reinforce each other.

Claude enterprise adoption is accelerating because regulated industries trust our safety-first approach. Kaiser Permanente and Brazil's education ministry chose Claude specifically for our safety track record.
We welcome regulation that raises the bar for everyone. The EU AI Act creates a framework that responsible companies like Anthropic are already aligned with.
Competition makes the whole field better. We're focused on building the most reliable, steerable AI — not on winning benchmark races.

recent_coverage.title: Anthropic expands Claude enterprise tier with SOC 2 compliance
recent_coverage.body: Major enterprise update with compliance features for regulated industries.

recent_coverage.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5 with reasoning capabilities
recent_coverage.body: Competitive launch with benchmarks showing parity on some evaluations.

recent_coverage.title: NYT opinion: AI safety is a marketing strategy, not research
recent_coverage.body: Critical piece using Anthropic as primary example, quoting former employees.

recent_coverage.title: Kaiser Permanente deploys Claude for clinical documentation
recent_coverage.body: Positive pilot results showing 40% time reduction with human oversight.

recent_coverage.title: FTC Commissioner announces investigation into AI data practices
recent_coverage.body: Anthropic named alongside others in data collection inquiry.
